description_long: This is a modern quadcopter drone with a sleek, rectangular central body and four extended arms, each ending in a circular rotor housing. The rotors are encased in light-colored, translucent guards, providing both protection and aerodynamic efficiency. The main body is predominantly gray and black, with a streamlined, low-profile design and what appears to be a camera module mounted at the front. The arms are jointed and reinforced, connecting the rotors to the central chassis with visible mechanical detail. The underside of the drone is flat, and there are no visible landing legs, suggesting it lands on its base. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for urban aerial operations such as surveillance, delivery, or inspection.
description: A sleek quadcopter drone with a rectangular gray body, four circular rotors with translucent guards, and a front-mounted camera. The design is compact and modern, ideal for urban aerial tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camera module, central body, and all four rotors with translucent guards clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat, low-profile body and the arm structure connecting the rotors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central body and the symmetrical arrangement of the rotors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the flat underside and the streamlined design of the drone.
